events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the staged fixture relies solely on the suspended ceiling grid for support, which violates NEC 410.36(B) — fixtures in suspended ceilings need independent support to the building structure (e.g., support wires), in addition to grid attachment. Decision is `fail`, risk `high`, with corrective actions to add independent support before proceeding.
